fields.label: Main Title
fields.description: The primary title of the dataset

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.description: A secondary or alternative title

fields.label: Abstract
fields.description: A concise summary of the dataset's content and purpose

fields.label: Methods Description
fields.description: Description of the methods used to collect or generate the dataset

fields.label: Collection Start Date
fields.description: Date when data collection began

fields.label: Submission Date
fields.description: Date the dataset was submitted for review

fields.label: Keywords
fields.description: Subject terms or tags that describe the dataset

fields.label: Language
fields.description: Primary language of the dataset content

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Dataset version string

fields.label: License
fields.description: The license under which the dataset is published

fields.label: Access Type
fields.description: Whether the dataset is open, restricted, or embargoed

fields.label: Rights Statement
fields.description: Free-text rights or usage conditions

fields.label: Data Format
fields.description: File formats used in the dataset

fields.label: Collection Method
fields.description: How the data was collected (e.g., survey, sensor, EHR extract)

fields.label: Quality Assurance
fields.description: Steps taken to verify or clean the data

fields.label: Brief Title
fields.description: Short title of the clinical study

fields.label: Official Title
fields.description: Full official title of the clinical study

fields.label: Brief Summary
fields.description: A short paragraph summarising the study

fields.label: Detailed Description
fields.description: Extended description of the study background, rationale, and objectives

fields.label: NCT Number
fields.description: ClinicalTrials.gov registration identifier

fields.label: Inclusion Criteria
fields.description: Criteria a participant must meet to be enrolled

fields.label: Exclusion Criteria
fields.description: Criteria that disqualify a participant from enrollment

fields.label: Minimum Age
fields.description: Minimum participant age

fields.label: Maximum Age
fields.description: Maximum participant age

fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Eligible sex(es) for participation

fields.label: Study Type
fields.description: Interventional or Observational

fields.label: Phase
fields.description: Clinical trial phase (e.g., Phase II)

fields.label: Allocation
fields.description: How participants are assigned to arms (randomized, non-randomized)

fields.label: Masking
fields.description: Who is blinded in the trial

fields.label: Primary Purpose
fields.description: Main reason for conducting the study
